title: rubus lasioclados
intro: Rubus lasioclados, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, native to the Himalayas. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus lasioclados include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as a natural remedy for various ailments.
